children.text: Thanks for choosing Golf GPS Range Finder Free by Mozosoft Apps.
This is a quick introduction to the app. You can watch the 2 minute youtube video by pressing the button below, swipe left for the next page, or skip it all if you like.
The zoom self button will zoom the map back to your current location. If you are ever unable to find yourself on the map, press this button.

content-desc: Button to zoom back to your current location
